data.body:
CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓

Updated test call sites:
- tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh: CLASSIFIER_GIT_DIR→_MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR in run_classifier helper; MOCK_MERGE_HEAD=1→make_merge_head_git_dir() for 2 tests; MOCK_REBASE_HEAD=1→make_rebase_head_git_dir() for rebase test; removed unset MOCK_MERGE_HEAD
- tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-size-thresholds.sh: MOCK_MERGE_HEAD=1+CLASSIFIER_GIT_DIR→make_merge_head_git_dir()+ _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR; 2x CLASSIFIER_GIT_DIR→_MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR
- plugins/dso/scripts/test-isolation-rules/no-real-git-state.sh: added _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR as valid isolation marker
